title: centaurea nissana f. orbelica
intro: Centaurea nissana f. orbelica is a plant species, also known as mountain centaury, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea nissana f. orbelica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
